signal_title: FTC Workshop on Age Verification Technologies
risk_rationale: The FTC workshop indicates a regulatory focus on age verification technologies, which may impact TikTok's current age assurance posture. While no immediate changes are mandated, the discussion highlights potential future regulatory expectations that could require enhancements to existing systems.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access.
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Discussion on effectiveness and challenges of age verification methods.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The current baseline relies on machine learning and safety reviews, which may not fully align with potential future expectations for more robust age verification methods.

remediations.title: Enhance Age Verification Methods
remediations.description: Explore and integrate more advanced age verification technologies to align with potential future regulatory expectations discussed in the FTC workshop.
acceptance_criteria: Implementation of at least one new age verification method
Demonstrated improvement in accuracy of age detection

business_impact: Potential need for investment in new technologies and processes to enhance age verification, which may increase operational costs.
recommended_actions: Monitor FTC developments for any formal regulatory changes.
Conduct a feasibility study on integrating advanced age verification technologies.
Prepare a roadmap for potential system enhancements to ensure compliance with future regulations.
